[[BLOCK:slide19_shape1]]
The primary distinction between OLS Regression and penalized regression lies in the inclusion of a regularization term in the Loss function (Loss function) to optimize coefficient estimation. Consequently, penalized regression is also referred to as Regularized Regression (Regularized Regression).  
L1 regularization (LASSO): Incorporates the sum of the absolute values of coefficient estimates as the regularization term.  
L2 regularization (Ridge): Incorporates the sum of the squares of coefficient estimates.
